name_en: Burberry [6641] Small Exquisite 'Title - Teller Handbag', crafted from selected smooth two-tone leather and vintage check pieces, accented with three exquisite rivets. Can be carried by the top handle or worn on the shoulder with a detachable strap. Dimensions: 26 x 13.5 x 20cm
